item.title: You(r)Tuber (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 0

Chopkhun never expected his longtime partner to cheat and take over their YouTube channel. Determined to surpass his ex, he starts anew-first step, building a team. Surprisingly, famed cameraman Intouch applies.

(Source: IMDb)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Muea Phom Yak Pen YouTuber Kheang Kap Faen Kao" (เมื่อผมอยากเป็นยูทูปเบอร์แข่งกับแฟนเก่า) by Afternoonmood.

View on MyDramaList

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Police in Love (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 0

Marry me? Just six months and we'll divorce.

Inspector Thiartha's mother gives him an ultimatum. To counteract his bad luck, he'll have to marry someone born Monday, the thirteenth of October. As if that weren't hard enough, their first and last names must contain the Thai consonant ro ruea. Turns out that his junior, Police Senior Sergeant Major Mangkorn, was born on exactly that day, name as prescribed, perfect to the last item.

(Source: Thai = argentis_th X; daradaily || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Phanraya Sarawat Thia" (ภรรยาสารวัตรเธียร์) by kanola.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 0

Marry me? Just six months and we'll divorce.

Inspector Thiartha's mother gives him an ultimatum. To counteract his bad luck, he'll have to marry someone born Monday, the thirteenth of October. As if that weren't hard enough, their first and last names must contain the Thai consonant ro ruea. Turns out that his junior, Police Senior Sergeant Major Mangkorn, was born on exactly that day, name as prescribed, perfect to the last item.

(Source: Thai = argentis_th X; daradaily || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Phanraya Sarawat Thia" (ภรรยาสารวัตรเธียร์) by kanola.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Painter of the Night (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 0

Since birth, Na Gyum was an exceptionally talented painter. However, though he had published a few collections under a pseudonym, he had decided to quit painting. Then Seung Ho, a young nobleman, barges into his life. An infamous tyrant notorious for his insatiable lust for creativity, Seung Ho forces Na Gyum to become his private painter. However, the nights that await Na Gyum are beyond anything he could have imagined…

(Source: lezhinus.com) ~~ Adapted from the webtoon "Painter of the Night" (야화첩) by Byeonduck (변덕).

View on MyDramaList

Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 0

Since birth, Na Gyum was an exceptionally talented painter. However, though he had published a few collections under a pseudonym, he had decided to quit painting. However, the nights that await Na Gyum are beyond anything he could have imagined…

item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 0

Something's about to be tied.

Bound not to break, but to last - Some knots are written by fate.

Who then wears the mark of prey?

(Source: m.flowentertainment Instagram)

item.title: Hug E-Lhee the Musical (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 0

Noi, the son of a som tam restaurant owner, is stuck working as a waiter though he dreams of being a singer. When his mother falls ill, she entrusts him with the business. He's soon set an additional challenge when a man from the big city moves into town and opens a rival fusion restaurant.

(Source: MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 0

(Source: MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Connecting to You (2026)
item.description:
Country: Taiwan

Total Episodes: 13

Many people have the superpower of seeing something invisible. Jia Kai can't see ghosts, but he can see the different colored threads connecting people. The more threads, the more bonds a person has.

Jia Kai has seen countless threads, but he hasn't been connected to anyone at all. He can't figure out why but has accepted himself as a loner. However, because of a chaotic incident, he meets a policeman named Da Wei and realizes that one silver-grey thread has grown from him to him, connecting them together!

Jia Kai doesn't want to lose the connection, so he takes a part-time job at the police station to get closer to Da Wei. With his superpower, he helps with cases of missing people and objects. They get to know each other better, and the thread between them begins to change color, from silver-grey to yellow, representing friendship, and even to red, representing love. Seeing these changes, Jia Kai realizes that how they feel for each other can't be hidden anymore...

(Source: goldenhorse.org.tw)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Wu Hsien Jen Sheng: Cheng Ko Shih Chieh, Chih Yu Ni Lien Shang Liao Wo" ((無線人生：整個世界，隻有你連上了我) by Beck.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Taiwan

Total Episodes: 13

Many people have the superpower of seeing something invisible. Jia Kai can't see ghosts, but he can see the different colored threads connecting people. The more threads, the more bonds a person has.

Jia Kai has seen countless threads, but he hasn't been connected to anyone at all. He can't figure out why but has accepted himself as a loner. However, because of a chaotic incident, he meets a policeman named Da Wei and realizes that one silver-grey thread has grown from him to him, connecting them together!

Jia Kai doesn't want to lose the connection, so he takes a part-time job at the police station to get closer to Da Wei. With his superpower, he helps with cases of missing people and objects. They get to know each other better, and the thread between them begins to change color, from silver-grey to yellow, representing friendship, and even to red, representing love. Seeing these changes, Jia Kai realizes that how they feel for each other can't be hidden anymore...

(Source: goldenhorse.org.tw)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Wu Hsien Jen Sheng: Cheng Ko Shih Chieh, Chih Yu Ni Lien Shang Liao Wo" ((無線人生：整個世界，隻有你連上了我) by Beck.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Love Destiny (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — Jul 14, 2026

Great is a modern, optimistic surgeon from the year 2025 who's always happy to help others. After an accident befalls him, he winds up in the body of Phor Kaew, a man living in the past, despised by all of Ayutthaya. Unsuccessful in finding a way to return to the present, to survive in Kaew's life and by being himself, he gradually comes to win over the people around him.

(Source: Thai = cuuthailand Instagram || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Bupphesanniwat" (บุพเพสันนิวาส) by Rompaeng (รอมแพง). ~~ Co-production with China.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — Jul 14, 2026

Great is a modern, optimistic surgeon from the year 2025 who's always happy to help others. After an accident befalls him, he winds up in the body of Phor Kaew, a man living in the past, despised by all of Ayutthaya. Unsuccessful in finding a way to return to the present, to survive in Kaew's life and by being himself, he gradually comes to win over the people around him.

(Source: Thai = cuuthailand Instagram || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Bupphesanniwat" (บุพเพสันนิวาส) by Rompaeng (รอมแพง). ~~ Co-production with China.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Lost to Light (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — Jun 20, 2026

Disband the group?! No way!!! Once an idol group with dreams of stardom, they’re now forced to wear mascots and sing children’s songs for kindergarten kids. Humiliating? Absolutely. Everyone quits. Everyone—except Jeng, the only one who stays beside Boss Sithian.

“I hereby announce—we are recruiting new members!” The new lineup? Main rapper—now helping his dad drive a long-tail boat and his mom sell goods from a pickup truck; main dancer—a former national cover dance champion once representing Thailand in Korea… and now teaching aerobics to grandmas; main vocal—a rescue volunteer who sings to calm people about to jump off buildings.

Then comes the boss’s brutal condition. If you don’t want the group to disband, take this guy on. The artsy guitarist with the boiled-face look—Mai? The annoying guy from the bar last night?! No way! What Jeng doesn’t know… Mai is actually the younger brother of the label’s chairman—and he joins the group with one secret mission: to win Jeng’s heart.

Meanwhile, Boss Sithian must confront his past and ask for help from Bailiu, his high-school ex, now the CEO of a wildly successful music label. Can Bailiu save Ultimate Wolf, a label on the brink of collapse? Will Jeng finally rise to the light—or fall into complete failure?

(Source: UltimateTroop official YouTube)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — Jun 20, 2026

Disband the group?! No way!!! Once an idol group with dreams of stardom, they’re now forced to wear mascots and sing children’s songs for kindergarten kids. Humiliating? Absolutely. Everyone quits. Everyone—except Jeng, the only one who stays beside Boss Sithian.

“I hereby announce—we are recruiting new members!” The new lineup? Main rapper—now helping his dad drive a long-tail boat and his mom sell goods from a pickup truck; main dancer—a former national cover dance champion once representing Thailand in Korea… and now teaching aerobics to grandmas; main vocal—a rescue volunteer who sings to calm people about to jump off buildings.

Then comes the boss’s brutal condition. If you don’t want the group to disband, take this guy on. The artsy guitarist with the boiled-face look—Mai? The annoying guy from the bar last night?! No way! What Jeng doesn’t know… Mai is actually the younger brother of the label’s chairman—and he joins the group with one secret mission: to win Jeng’s heart.

Meanwhile, Boss Sithian must confront his past and ask for help from Bailiu, his high-school ex, now the CEO of a wildly successful music label. Can Bailiu save Ultimate Wolf, a label on the brink of collapse? Will Jeng finally rise to the light—or fall into complete failure?

(Source: UltimateTroop official YouTube)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Ticket to Heaven (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 5

Next Episode: 1 of 5 — May 30, 2026

When troubled Barth moves into his school, young seminarian Tanrak is asked to look after him and put him on the right path. Barth's presence, however, accidentally serves to test Tanrak as he struggles to reconcile his innate feelings with his faith and fears for his future.

(Source: MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 5

Next Episode: 1 of 5 — May 30, 2026

When troubled Barth moves into his school, young seminarian Tanrak is asked to look after him and put him on the right path. Barth's presence, however, accidentally serves to test Tanrak as he struggles to reconcile his innate feelings with his faith and fears for his future.

(Source: MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Payback (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 30, 2026

Sun is a 25-year-old deliveryman with a troubled past. Violence took his brother and mother away, and guilt leads him to redemption—but not to forgetting. Entering Dream Entertainment marks the start of revenge and his reunion with Jay, the intimidating and charismatic company director. Jay believes in strategy over emotion, viewing every relationship as a transaction. Beneath his cool exterior lies a deep, unhealed wound—until the appearance of Sun begins to shake the world Jay once had completely under control.

With Jay stepping in as Sun's sponsor and quietly backing his every move amidst the fierce competition of the showbiz world, the two find themselves entangled in a complex relationship, forced to rely on each other to survive the fight.

(Source: PaybackSeries X; edited by MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the webtoon "Payback" (페이백) written by samk (임상윤) and illustrated by Fujoking (푸죠킹).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 30, 2026

Sun is a 25-year-old deliveryman with a troubled past. Violence took his brother and mother away, and guilt leads him to redemption—but not to forgetting. Entering Dream Entertainment marks the start of revenge and his reunion with Jay, the intimidating and charismatic company director. Jay believes in strategy over emotion, viewing every relationship as a transaction. Beneath his cool exterior lies a deep, unhealed wound—until the appearance of Sun begins to shake the world Jay once had completely under control.

With Jay stepping in as Sun's sponsor and quietly backing his every move amidst the fierce competition of the showbiz world, the two find themselves entangled in a complex relationship, forced to rely on each other to survive the fight.

(Source: PaybackSeries X; edited by MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the webtoon "Payback" (페이백) written by samk (임상윤) and illustrated by Fujoking (푸죠킹).

View on MyDramaList

item.title: A Dog and a Plane (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 29, 2026

After flight attendant Kanit clashes with three EMTs and his bag is accidentally exchanged with EMT Toto's, the chaotic trio borrow his expensive belongings for a night out and they get stolen. When the truth comes out and Toto can't afford to pay Kanit back, he agrees to a trade of labour. Kanit tasks Toto with uncovering his boyfriend's cheating. When he does, however, Toto is bribed by Kanit's pilot boyfriend to keep it quiet. As the two spend more time together and their closeness grows, Toto may begin to regret his lie.

(Source: MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 29, 2026

After flight attendant Kanit clashes with three EMTs and his bag is accidentally exchanged with EMT Toto's, the chaotic trio borrow his expensive belongings for a night out and they get stolen. When the truth comes out and Toto can't afford to pay Kanit back, he agrees to a trade of labour. Kanit tasks Toto with uncovering his boyfriend's cheating. When he does, however, Toto is bribed by Kanit's pilot boyfriend to keep it quiet. As the two spend more time together and their closeness grows, Toto may begin to regret his lie.

(Source: MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Love Class Season 3 (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 27, 2026

While competing on an idol survival show together, Hyeon Jae and Su An grew close. However, only Hyeon Jae made the final cut to debut, forcing them to part ways despite their lingering attraction. Years later, they manage to reunite through a project, but it's not the happy reunion they might have hoped for: now that they're more established in the entertainment industry, openly expressing their feelings for each other is even riskier than before.

Fellow idols Jae Min, who's trying to recover his reputation after a scandal, and Khun, who's come to Korea from Thailand in search of a new start, bond through commiserating over their difficult situations, but they too must confront the fact that they might not be able to act on their feelings.

(Source: Viki)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 27, 2026

While competing on an idol survival show together, Hyeon Jae and Su An grew close. However, only Hyeon Jae made the final cut to debut, forcing them to part ways despite their lingering attraction. Years later, they manage to reunite through a project, but it's not the happy reunion they might have hoped for: now that they're more established in the entertainment industry, openly expressing their feelings for each other is even riskier than before.

Fellow idols Jae Min, who's trying to recover his reputation after a scandal, and Khun, who's come to Korea from Thailand in search of a new start, bond through commiserating over their difficult situations, but they too must confront the fact that they might not be able to act on their feelings.

(Source: Viki)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Yatara Yarashii Fukami-kun (2026)
item.description:
Country: Japan

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 8 of 10 — May 25, 2026

When secretly judgmental sales ace Kaji discovers the unexpected charm of his seemingly dull colleague Fukami during an overnight trip, their shared views on love ignite a passionate casual arrangement that slowly blossoms into a genuine romance.

(Source: TMDb)

~~ Adapted from the manga series "Yatara Yarashii Fukami-kun." (やたらやらしい深見くん) by Matsumoto Ayaka (松本あやか).

View on MyDramaList

Country: Japan

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Seoul Trip (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 6

Next Episode: 6 of 6 — May 24, 2026

On the first day of my trip to Seoul, I chased down a man I mistook for a pickpocket, only to end up spending the night with him. To my horror, I later found my wallet tucked safely in my bag—and discovered he was actually waiting for an "outcall service." The moment I’m forced to pay my debt with my body instead of cash, a disastrous misunderstanding spirals into a dangerous Seoul affair.

(Source: TMDb)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 6

Next Episode: 6 of 6 — May 24, 2026

On the first day of my trip to Seoul, I chased down a man I mistook for a pickpocket, only to end up spending the night with him. To my horror, I later found my wallet tucked safely in my bag—and discovered he was actually waiting for an "outcall service." The moment I’m forced to pay my debt with my body instead of cash, a disastrous misunderstanding spirals into a dangerous Seoul affair.

(Source: TMDb)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Crazy Love, Moo-Moo! (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 3 of 10 — May 23, 2026

When Hia Fu, the eldest son of a Chinese-Thai family in Kanchanaburi and a full-on hopeless romantic, finds himself trying to win over his younger brother's friend Moo—who clearly states he's not into fair-skinned Chinese guys like him—things are bound to get complicated.

The chaos begins when the two unexpectedly match on a dating DP without realising who the other person is. From rivals to lovers, their relationship turns into one filled with intense jealousy and undeniable chemistry—yet neither is willing to admit their true feelings.

(Source: Viu)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Phi Fak Chop Thoe Mu" (พี่ฟากชอบเธอมู่) by Littleskyofme.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 3 of 10 — May 23, 2026

When Hia Fu, the eldest son of a Chinese-Thai family in Kanchanaburi and a full-on hopeless romantic, finds himself trying to win over his younger brother's friend Moo—who clearly states he's not into fair-skinned Chinese guys like him—things are bound to get complicated.

The chaos begins when the two unexpectedly match on a dating DP without realising who the other person is. From rivals to lovers, their relationship turns into one filled with intense jealousy and undeniable chemistry—yet neither is willing to admit their true feelings.

(Source: Viu)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Phi Fak Chop Thoe Mu" (พี่ฟากชอบเธอมู่) by Littleskyofme.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Love upon a Time (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 9 of 12 — May 22, 2026

Nakhun is an unsuperstitious twenty-year-old student. One day, fate plays a trick on him and he winds up travelling back nearly four hundred years to the Ayutthaya Kingdom. He's mistaken for someone who had gone missing, so Nakhun assumes the identity of Klao and tries to work out the mystery of his disappearance while searching for a way back to his time period.

Klao's friend Phop doesn't believe that Nakhun is the younger brother he knew and keeps an eye trained on him.

(Source: Thai = se-ed.com || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Love Upon a Time" (ภพเธอ) by littlebbear96.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 9 of 12 — May 22, 2026

Nakhun is an unsuperstitious twenty-year-old student. One day, fate plays a trick on him and he winds up travelling back nearly four hundred years to the Ayutthaya Kingdom. He's mistaken for someone who had gone missing, so Nakhun assumes the identity of Klao and tries to work out the mystery of his disappearance while searching for a way back to his time period.

Klao's friend Phop doesn't believe that Nakhun is the younger brother he knew and keeps an eye trained on him.

(Source: Thai = se-ed.com || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Love Upon a Time" (ภพเธอ) by littlebbear96.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Wishing upon the Shooting Stars (2026)
item.description:
Country: Taiwan

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 10 of 12 — May 21, 2026

After getting laid off, timid office worker Xiang Yong returns to his hometown from Taipei and makes a wish not to be recognized, only to have it mysteriously come true. Mistaken for a stranger and kicked out by his father, he’s stunned to find the new B&B staff is his high school crush, Hao Wei. As a summer meteor shower approaches, the two reconnect, and Xiang Yong is forced to confront his true desires in a whimsical tale of healing and rediscovery.

(Source: MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Kuan Kan Liu Hsing Te Cheng Chueh Fang Shih" (觀看流星的正確方式) by Chung Min Jui (鍾旻瑞).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Taiwan

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 10 of 12 — May 21, 2026

After getting laid off, timid office worker Xiang Yong returns to his hometown from Taipei and makes a wish not to be recognized, only to have it mysteriously come true. Mistaken for a stranger and kicked out by his father, he’s stunned to find the new B&B staff is his high school crush, Hao Wei. As a summer meteor shower approaches, the two reconnect, and Xiang Yong is forced to confront his true desires in a whimsical tale of healing and rediscovery.

(Source: MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Kuan Kan Liu Hsing Te Cheng Chueh Fang Shih" (觀看流星的正確方式) by Chung Min Jui (鍾旻瑞).

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Check in to You (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 6

Next Episode: 1 of 6 — May 21, 2026

The story follows the chaotic body-swapping journey of two men from 180-degree different worlds who accidentally switch bodies after an unexpected incident. A ‘cold-hearted perfectionist’ who used to push everyone away, and a ‘warm-hearted romanticist’ who was always kind to others. Like oil and water, they never seemed meant to mix. But as they are forced to live each other's lives, they begin to understand their hidden scars, bickering until they unexpectedly find themselves falling deeply for one another.

(Source: Strongberry.kr)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 6

Next Episode: 1 of 6 — May 21, 2026

The story follows the chaotic body-swapping journey of two men from 180-degree different worlds who accidentally switch bodies after an unexpected incident. A ‘cold-hearted perfectionist’ who used to push everyone away, and a ‘warm-hearted romanticist’ who was always kind to others. Like oil and water, they never seemed meant to mix. But as they are forced to live each other's lives, they begin to understand their hidden scars, bickering until they unexpectedly find themselves falling deeply for one another.

(Source: Strongberry.kr)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: ChermChey (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 19, 2026

Akkhara, who has been hurt repeatedly in love, finds it hard to believe that he will ever meet true love in this lifetime. One day, he makes a wish at a temple, telling himself to "try one last time." At that very moment, he meets Intha, a rugged and confident bar owner. Intha trusts his instincts and begins pursuing Akkhara openly, but Akkhara, scarred by past pain, cannot bring himself to accept his feelings.

As the two work and live together at ChermChey bar, with alcohol loosening their hearts and everyday care drawing them closer, they gradually go from strangers to becoming the person each wants to protect most.

(Source: GagaOOLala)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Chermchey" (เฉิ่มเชย) by Nottakorn (นทกร).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 19, 2026

Akkhara, who has been hurt repeatedly in love, finds it hard to believe that he will ever meet true love in this lifetime. One day, he makes a wish at a temple, telling himself to "try one last time." At that very moment, he meets Intha, a rugged and confident bar owner. Intha trusts his instincts and begins pursuing Akkhara openly, but Akkhara, scarred by past pain, cannot bring himself to accept his feelings.

As the two work and live together at ChermChey bar, with alcohol loosening their hearts and everyday care drawing them closer, they gradually go from strangers to becoming the person each wants to protect most.

(Source: GagaOOLala)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Chermchey" (เฉิ่มเชย) by Nottakorn (นทกร).
